reviews.review_title: This is such a good game
reviews.review_description: I love this game so much and I recommend it to everyone. It's so fun to play horror running away from every monster and laughing when my friend makes jokes. Obviously if you don't like horror then you can play Parkour a fun mini game that you bounce on walls and platforms to get to the end. There I also pool which doesn't work yet but hopefully will soon.
This game has great horror and awesome gamemodes. Would play - 5/5
